General.Name: IMAX China Holding Inc
General.Description: IMAX China Holding, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides digital film technologies in the United States, Canada, Greater China, Asia, Western Europe, Latin America, and internationally. It operates in two segments, Content Solutions and Technology Products and Services. The company engages in the digital remastering and distribution of Hollywood, Chinese language, and other films in IMAX theatre network under the IMAX brand name. It also designs, procures, sells, and leases digital theatre systems, as well as provides related project management, maintenance services, warranty, and aftermarket sale of IMAX system parts and 3D glasses. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China. IMAX China Holding, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of IMAX (Barbados) Holding, Inc.
